reviews.review_title: If the creator sees this please read
reviews.review_description: So basically I went into a lobby and a bunch of kids were being rude and swearing and I really hate them doing this every lobby I go into a kid is rude with no intention I would like to be a moderator and fix these problems and I would make the game better for everyone to play my in game user is Henry and my quest name is questboy.2023 if I make it as a mod then I will make sure every racist and rude squeaker gets banned

reviews.review_title: One of The Best Fan Games
reviews.review_description:
I love to play this game! There is many game modes to chose from and one of the best game modes is horror which has two levels so far. The cosmetics in shop are so cool! But the best thing about the game and in my opinion is the community they are funny and amazing. 

:)
The owner is a nice guy and will help anybody out if they are having trouble. If this was a official game then I would praise him for his work!
This game is very fun but can you please get long arms working and maybe add camera mod to the game everything else on the mod menu is good just please fix longarms

developer_response.body: yea they kicked you bec you had the mod menu on and it was a mistake by me but you still put it on and they kicked you and its not  our fault that some people are mean, so just dont do stuff that will get you kicked.

reviews.review_description: The owner banded me for a glitch that he left I think he did it on purpose and to have fun I don’t like this game anymore it was my favorite game but not anymore so I’m giving the game a 1 star

developer_response.body: You shouldn't have done the glitch, and i fixed it so. But either way you did the glitch and didn't follow the rules of the game so you got banned and didn't stop, that's not my fault.
